title: Creating Space
description: Creating Space is a mod that allow you to create rocket using contraption and go to other planets.
body:
![Creating Space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9bd9f5b2cdf2e4f6b64a9424af34766407a804d.png)
# **Description**
Creating Space is a mod that allow you to create rocket using contraption and go to other planets. Be prepared to design a rocket inspired by realistic science.

tutorial part 1<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ep2_UnVzX9c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

tutorial part 2<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/C2mJ7z_Ddpg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **Links**
[discord](https://discord.gg/Dn9DhTqarH) | [Wiki](https://creating-space.fandom.com/wiki/Creating_Space_Wiki) | [youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmGPNKI1yYyWReLQRCG8V4g) | [modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/creating-spac) | [curse forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-creating-space)
 

# **WARNING**

It seems like forge version before 43.2.8 doesn't work with this mod.

Create Interactive isn't compatible with this mod right now
